options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: initial_weapon
options.description:
Chooses your initial weapon. Note you are not be able to equip the sword in the weapon hub in WeaponSanity until
you unlock it.

options.name: location_system
options.description:
Chooses how the game gives you items. (1) RoomBased gives items on every new room completed. (2) ScoreBased
gives items according to score obtained by clearing rooms (even repeated ones). For example; each time the player
completes room 4 it will award 4 points. Getting a new high-score gives an item and resets the score.
(3) RoomWeaponBased gives items on every new room completed with a new weapon (so more locations than the 
original room based system).

options.name: score_rewards_amount
options.description:
When using score based system, this sets how many checks are available based on the score.
Each room in hades gives "its depth" in score when completed, and each new check needs one more
point to be unlocked (so check 10 needs 10 points, which can be obtained, for example,
by completing rooms 5 and 6)

options.name: keepsakesanity
options.description:
Shuffles NPCs' keepsakes into the item pool, and makes each keepsake location a check. 
For simplicity this does not affects Hades and Persephone.

options.name: weaponsanity
options.description:
Shuffles weapons (except your initial weapon) into the item pool, and makes obtaining
each weapon at the House Contractor's shop a check.
Need to be sent the weapon item to gain the skill to equip them.

options.name: hidden_aspectsanity
options.description:
Shuffles weapon aspects into the item pool, and makes obtaining each aspect a check 
(which needs to be unlocked before being able to be bought).

options.name: storesanity
options.description:
Shuffles important items from the House Contractor's shop in the item pool.
Need to be sent the items to gain the different perks that make runs easier.

options.name: fatesanity
options.description:
Shuffles most rewards from the Fated List of Prophecies into the item pool, 
and makes the corresponding items from the list a check. 
Can make the games significantly longer.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: hades_defeats_needed
options.description: How many times you need to defeat Hades to win the world. 10 is for credits.

options.name: weapons_clears_needed
options.description: How many different weapons clears are needed to win the world.

options.name: keepsakes_needed
options.description: How many different keepsake unlocks are needed to win the world.

options.name: fates_needed
options.description: How many different Fated List completions are needed to win the world.

options.name: heat_system
options.description:
Choose either ReverseHeat (1), MinimalHeat (2) or VanillaHeat(3) for the game.
In ReverseHeat you start with heat pacts that cannot be disabled until you get the corresponding pact item.
In Minimal the settings for the PactsAmounts below set your minimal heat to be set, and cannot go below that level.
If not wanting to have one of this heat systems on, chose Vanilla heat 
(then the following options related to pacts do nothing).

options.name: hard_labor_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Hard Labor pacts in the pool.

options.name: lasting_consequences_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Lasting Consequences pacts in the pool.

options.name: convenience_fee_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Convenience Fee pacts in the pool.

options.name: jury_summons_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Jury Summons pacts in the pool.

options.name: extreme_measures_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Extreme Measures pacts in the pool.

options.name: calisthenics_program_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Calisthenics Program pacts in the pool.

options.name: benefits_package_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Benefits Package pacts in the pool.

options.name: middle_management_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Middle Management pacts in the pool.

options.name: underworld_customs_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Underworld Customs pacts in the pool.

options.name: forced_overtime_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Forced Overtime pacts in the pool.

options.name: heightened_security_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Heightened Security pacts in the pool.

options.name: routine_inspection_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Routine Inspection pacts in the pool.

options.name: damage_control_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Damage Control pacts in the pool.

options.name: approval_process_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Approval Process pacts in the pool.

options.name: tight_deadline_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Tight Deadline pacts in the pool.

options.name: personal_liability_pact_amount
options.description: Choose the amount of Personal Liability pacts in the pool.

options.name: darkness_pack_value
options.description:
Choose the value (amount of darkness) of each darkness pack in the pool. 
If set to 0 Darkness will not appear in the pool.

options.name: darkness_pack_percentage
options.description:
Choose the percentage of filler items in the pool that will be darkness packs.
Note if filler porcentage don't sum up to 100 the system will treat them as proportions.

options.name: keys_pack_value
options.description:
Choose the value(amount of Keys) of each Keys pack in the pool.
If set to 0 Keys will not appear in the pool.

options.name: keys_pack_percentage
options.description:
Choose the percentage of filler items in the pool that will be Key packs.
Note if filler porcentage don't sum up to 100 the system will treat them as proportions.

options.name: gemstones_pack_value
options.description:
Choose the value(amount of Gemstones) of each Gemstone pack in the pool. 
If set to 0 Gems will not appear in the pool.

options.name: gemstones_pack_percentage
options.description:
Choose the percentage of filler items in the pool that will be Gemstones packs.
Note if filler porcentage don't sum up to 100 the system will treat them as proportions.

options.name: diamonds_pack_value
options.description:
Choose the value(amount of diamonds) of each diamond pack in the pool. 
If set to 0 Diamonds will not appear in the pool.

options.name: diamonds_pack_percentage
options.description:
Choose the percentage of filler items in the pool that will be Gemstones packs.
Note if filler porcentage don't sum up to 100 the system will treat them as proportions.

options.name: titan_blood_pack_value
options.description:
Choose the value(amount of Titan blood) of each Titan blood pack in the pool. 
If set to 0 Titan blood will not appear in the pool.

options.name: titan_blood_pack_percentage
options.description:
Choose the percentage of filler items in the pool that will be Titan Blood packs.
Note if filler porcentage don't sum up to 100 the system will treat them as proportions.

options.name: nectar_pack_value
options.description:
Choose the value(amount of Nectar) of each Nectar pack in the pool. 
If set to 0 Nectar will not appear in the pool.

options.name: nectar_pack_percentage
options.description:
Choose the percentage of filler items in the pool that will be Nectar packs.
Note if filler porcentage don't sum up to 100 the system will treat them as proportions.

options.name: ambrosia_pack_value
options.description:
Choose the value(amount of Ambrosia) of each Ambrosia pack in the pool. 
If set to 0 Ambrosia will not appear in the pool.

options.name: ambrosia_pack_percentage
options.description:
Choose the percentage of filler items in the pool that will be Ambrosia packs.
Note if filler porcentage don't sum up to 100 the system will treat them as proportions.

options.name: filler_helper_percentage
options.description:
Choose the percentage of filler items in the pool that will be helpers instead. 
Helpers give a boost to your max Health or boost the chance of obtaining rare Boons.
Note if filler porcentage don't sum up to 100 the system will treat them as proportions.

options.name: max_health_helper_percentage
options.description: Choose the percentage of helper items that will boost your max health.

options.name: initial_money_helper_percentage
options.description:
Choose the percentage of helper items that will boost your initial money by 25 each run.
This gets capped by the percentage being left from the MaxHealthHelpers. 
What percentage remains from this and the MaxHealthHelpers will give you items that boost the 
rarity of the boons obtained in runs.

options.name: filler_trap_percentage
options.description:
Choose the percentage of filler items in the pool that will be traps instead. 
Traps diminish your money or health during a run.
Note if filler porcentage don't sum up to 100 the system will treat them as proportions.

options.name: reverse_order_em
options.description:
When true the order in which extreme meassures applied is reverse 
so level 1 is applied to Hades, instead to Meg/The Furies). 
For a more balanced experience.

options.name: ignore_greece_deaths
options.description: If deaths on Greece are ignored for deathlink. Leave off for the memes.

options.name: store_give_hints
options.description:
If seeing an item on the House Contractor's shop/Fated List of Prophecies 
should give a hint for it on the multiworld.

options.name: disable_late_styx
options.description: If true, rooms past room 55 will not have checks on room based settings.

options.name: automatic_rooms_finish_on_hades_defeat
options.display_name: Automatic Room Finish On Hades Defeat
options.description:
If defeating Hades should give all room clears on Room based location mode 
or all rooms clears with the equipped weapon on Room weapon based location mode.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
